title: 🔥周期定位：重返历史深寒区
body: 市场处于周期深寒区。MVRV 报 1.19，低于历史 81% 的时间，虽略高于上轮同期 2022-07 的 0.98，但整体仍处极低水位。回测近四年数据，当前估值位置与历史深熊底部高度重合，资产性价比显著。中性。历史底部还会反复吗？
title_en: 🔥Cycle Positioning: Returning to the Historic Deep Freeze
body_en:
Market is deep in the cycle's freeze zone. MVRV is at 1.19, below 81% of historical data. While slightly above the same point last cycle (0.98 in July '22), the overall level is still critically low. Backtesting the last 4 years shows current valuations aligning heavily with historic deep bear bottoms. The risk-reward setup is compelling.
Neutral.
Will the bottom see more chop?
